title: Generating a nested data structure from a prompt
scenario: Create a data structure that represents a family tree with multiple generations. The data structure should include information about each person's name, age, occupation, and relationships with other family members. The prompt should be under 50 words.
constraints: Must use nested objects to represent the family relationships

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the data is accurate and consistent.
Check if the data structure is valid and correctly represents the family relationships.
Check if the prompt is adhered to and is under 50 words.
Check if the data size is reasonable and not excessively large.
